name: Johnnys Favorite Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all crust ingredients in a bowl and press into a 13x9 glass pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Cool completely.
2. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Set aside.
3. Whip the whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
4. Dissolve the lemon Jello in boiling water and let cool slightly.
5. Add the whipped cream to the cooled jello mixture and stir until combined.
6. Pour this center filling over the crust, spreading it evenly with the back of a spoon to avoid creating a hole in the center.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until set completely.
8. In a separate bowl, mix the raspberry gelatin powder with boiling water and let cool until ready to use.
9. Once the center is chilled, pour the gelatin mixture over it and spread evenly.
10. Chill until the topping is fully set.
11. Cut into squares and serve chilled. Keep refrigerated.
